notes: SHIP v1.14.328 - FIX the black box around the boot ghost (owner device-reported on .327). ROOT CAUSE: .327's phantom-ghost.webp was OPAQUE with a pure-#000 background; the boot's breathing aura + ambient gradient make the area AROUND the ghost lighter than #000, so the ghost's opaque black rectangle OCCLUDED that glow and read as a darker box punched into it (confirmed: asset corners/edges all luma 0, no frame in the art; the box only appears composited over the lit boot bg). mix-blend-mode:screen did NOT fix it (backdrop behind the rectangle corners is ~#000, nothing to reveal). FIX: knocked the exterior black out to ALPHA via an edge-flood-fill (seed from all borders, fill connected pixels luma<=9, set alpha 0) done in-canvas (Chrome, same-origin) then re-encoded via canvas.toDataURL('image/webp',0.92) = a transparent VP8X webp (alpha flag set, 1086x1448 preserved, 150282b, ~same size as the opaque original). Flood-fill (not a bare luma threshold) so the ghost's DARK INTERIOR regions stay opaque - only the surrounding box is removed; bottom reflection kept (luma>threshold). Shipped under a NEW FILENAME phantom-ghost-v2.webp (raster-asset-by-filename convention, same as phantom-ui-assistant-v2 / manifest-og-v2) so John's cached opaque .327 ghost cannot be served stale - the new URL forces a refetch. Repointed 2 refs: dct-ios.html .pe-ghost src + sw.js precache; removed the opaque phantom-ghost.webp. Aspect + circuit-eye positions unchanged (identical pixels, only alpha differs) so #pe-eyes fractions still align. NO CSS/JS logic change beyond the src string; all .327 boot animation (peBob/peBreathe/peEyeOn/peLockOn/peGhostDive/motes) intact. VERIFIED in-browser at 412px: box GONE, ghost floats with continuous aura around it, crisp rim (no fringe on zoom), reflection + eyes intact. Gates: inline-JS vm.Script compile x3, sw.js ok, version.json valid, CSS brace net-0, three-stamp .327->.328 lockstep. DEVICE-VERIFY (installed PWA portrait, HARD-REFRESH / clear SW cache first): NO black box around the ghost - it floats cleanly on the boot glow; eyes stream code, aura breathes, TAP TO ENTER pulses, tap flashes into the app. ROLLBACK: repoint src+precache back to phantom-ghost.webp and restore it, revert the 3 stamps.
